jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Max Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
Max Healthcare has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Max Healthcare:
Max Healthcare is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Healthcare!
